description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design, surrounded by a decorative fence. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The property is landscaped with a row of tall, conical trees along one side and several mature deciduous trees, as well as a paved driveway leading to a carport. The front yard includes a small garden area and a patio with outdoor furniture, while the backyard offers additional open space and greenery. The building appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back and partially enclosed by decorative panels. The overall color palette is neutral, dominated by whites and grays, with accents of green from the landscaping and a red car parked in the driveway.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a decorative fence. The property features a driveway, carport, patio, and a mix of tall and broad-leaved trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a red car, and a row of tall trees along the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, patio area, and dense tree coverage on the left side of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, open patio, and the arrangement of trees and outdoor furniture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the row of tall conical trees and the upper story setback.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
